_: J-space schematic data contract. While empirical:false the methods (Step 4) and technical (Part 2) pages keep the hand-authored 'Illustrative schematic' figure untouched. When the backend commits a real J-lens residual-stream readout for the worked example, set empirical:true and fill panels; the pages then render these tokens into the J-space pills, replace the input/output, and relabel the figure 'Empirical J-lens residual stream readout at middle layers.' The disclaimer must never say 'empirical' while empirical is false.
